TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Kin lwan = Gaga mniq Sincuseyn Ceynsusyang ka alang Kin lwan. 54 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 183 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 94% niqan 172 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 6% niqan 11 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 91%, Amis 2%, Paiwan 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%. = Alang Cingru ( Kin lwan) ťĆ¶Ť∑ĮťÉ®ŤźĹ = Ngayan alang : Alang Cingruu ( Kin Iwan) Pgkela alang Alang cingru we Cingrouwan kesun daha duri. Nniqan Singcusien Ciensusiyang Siyoruwancun Knuglahang Meniq tnarac ruru Siyoruwan, quri gqiyan hido dgiyaq Sinaci, ga ckceka dgiyaq ma yaani hari 1000 (maxal kbekuy) kongcu ka haypa na. Dheran kndkilan Dheran kteetu Kklaan ptpaan rulu Mgeriq ruru Malu moda mquri Singcu Neiwan, pgqiri 60 (mmteru kmxalan) Siyentaw remux Ciyensu, kleelu moda Naro, Yiraw, Tenpu ma Siyoruwan knii alang, hmrinas paru hako Siyoruwan di pgeriq eluw Siyocing, kii dehuk ka alang Cingru. Pnsltulun Tencu Titu Tencu Titu alang Kluwan nYencuming Tayal Srengo daha kari Kari Tayal ma Kari Plmukan Pnyaan alang hini Yaani berah kingal kbekuy (100..) msngari knkawas hari, seediq Taikangse, mnswai Pinuwkan ma Warannuw qmita ka dheya, keyan ba knmalu phmaan ma muuxul bale ka karac hini, kii dmdudul pkrana seediq meeniq hini, ado knrahur bale seediq, kii duma seediq wada mtheruy meniq sipo. Ani si sqlhangan Nihong ciida dige pnspuwan ka sipo duri di, kii kesun daha Cingruse.
S.PHON: = kin lwan = gaga mniq sin ¶us…ôn ¶…ônsusjaŇč ka alaŇč kin lwan. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, tajal **%, amis *%, paiwan *%, ni …ĺańßuq na o *%. = alaŇč ¶iŇč…ĺu ( kin lwan) **** = Ňčajan alaŇč : alaŇč ¶iŇč…ĺuu ( kin iwan) pgk…ôla alaŇč alaŇč ¶iŇč…ĺu w…ô ¶iŇč…ĺouwan k…ôsun dańßa du…ĺi. nniqan siŇč ¶usi…ôn ¶i…ônsusijaŇč sijo…ĺuwan ¶un knuglańßaŇč m…ôniq tna…ĺa ¶ …ĺu…ĺu sijo…ĺuwan, qu…ĺi gqijan ńßido dgijaq sina ¶i, ga ¶k ¶…ôka dgijaq ma jaani ńßa…ĺi **** (maxal kb…ôkuj) koŇč ¶u ka ńßajpa na. dńß…ô…ĺan kndkilan dńß…ô…ĺan kt…ô…ôtu kklaan ptpaan …ĺulu mg…ô…ĺiq …ĺu…ĺu malu moda mqu…ĺi siŇč ¶u n…ôiwan, pgqi…ĺi ** (mmt…ô…ĺu kmxalan) sij…ôntaw …ĺ…ômux ¶ij…ônsu, kl…ô…ôlu moda na…ĺo, ji…ĺaw, t…ônpu ma sijo…ĺuwan knii alaŇč, ńßm…ĺinas pa…ĺu ńßako sijo…ĺuwan di pg…ô…ĺiq …ôluw sijo ¶iŇč, kii d…ôńßuk ka alaŇč ¶iŇč…ĺu. pnsltulun t…ôn ¶u titu t…ôn ¶u titu alaŇč kluwan nj…ôn ¶umiŇč tajal s…ĺ…ôŇčo dańßa ka…ĺi ka…ĺi tajal ma ka…ĺi plmukan pnjaan alaŇč ńßini jaani b…ô…ĺańß kiŇčal kb…ôkuj (***..) msŇča…ĺi knkawas ńßa…ĺi, s…ô…ôdiq taikaŇčs…ô, mnswai pinuwkan ma wa…ĺannuw qmita ka dńß…ôa, k…ôan ba knmalu pńßmaan ma muuxul bal…ô ka ka…ĺa ¶ ńßini, kii dmdudul pk…ĺana s…ô…ôdiq m…ô…ôniq ńßini, ado kn…ĺańßu…ĺ bal…ô s…ô…ôdiq, kii duma s…ô…ôdiq wada mtńß…ô…ĺuj m…ôniq sipo. ani si sqlńßaŇčan nińßoŇč ¶iida dig…ô pnspuwan ka sipo du…ĺi di, kii k…ôsun dańßa ¶iŇč…ĺus…ô.
S.FORM: = Kin lwan = Gaga mniq Sincuseyn Ceynsusyang ka alang Kin lwan. 54 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 183 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 94% niqan 172 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 6% niqan 11 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 91%, Amis 2%, Paiwan 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%. = Alang Cingru ( Kin lwan) ťĆ¶Ť∑ĮťÉ®ŤźĹ = Ngayan alang : Alang Cingruu ( Kin Iwan) Pgkela alang Alang cingru we Cingrouwan kesun daha duri. Nniqan Singcusien Ciensusiyang Siyoruwancun Knuglahang Meniq tnarac ruru Siyoruwan, quri gqiyan hido dgiyaq Sinaci, ga ckceka dgiyaq ma yaani hari 1000 (maxal kbekuy) kongcu ka haypa na. Dheran kndkilan Dheran kteetu Kklaan ptpaan rulu Mgeriq ruru Malu moda mquri Singcu Neiwan, pgqiri 60 (mmteru kmxalan) Siyentaw remux Ciyensu, kleelu moda Naro, Yiraw, Tenpu ma Siyoruwan knii alang, hmrinas paru hako Siyoruwan di pgeriq eluw Siyocing, kii dehuk ka alang Cingru. Pnsltulun Tencu Titu Tencu Titu alang Kluwan nYencuming Tayal Srengo daha kari Kari Tayal ma Kari Plmukan Pnyaan alang hini Yaani berah kingal kbekuy (100..) msngari knkawas hari, seediq Taikangse, mnswai Pinuwkan ma Warannuw qmita ka dheya, keyan ba knmalu phmaan ma muuxul bale ka karac hini, kii dmdudul pkrana seediq meeniq hini, ado knrahur bale seediq, kii duma seediq wada mtheruy meniq sipo. Ani si sqlhangan Nihong ciida dige pnspuwan ka sipo duri di, kii kesun daha Cingruse.
S.PHON: = kin lwan = gaga mniq sin ¶us…ôn ¶…ônsusjaŇč ka alaŇč kin lwan. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, tajal **%, amis *%, paiwan *%, ni …ĺańßuq na o *%. = alaŇč ¶iŇč…ĺu ( kin lwan) **** = Ňčajan alaŇč : alaŇč ¶iŇč…ĺuu ( kin iwan) pgk…ôla alaŇč alaŇč ¶iŇč…ĺu w…ô ¶iŇč…ĺouwan k…ôsun dańßa du…ĺi. nniqan siŇč ¶usi…ôn ¶i…ônsusijaŇč sijo…ĺuwan ¶un knuglańßaŇč m…ôniq tna…ĺa ¶ …ĺu…ĺu sijo…ĺuwan, qu…ĺi gqijan ńßido dgijaq sina ¶i, ga ¶k ¶…ôka dgijaq ma jaani ńßa…ĺi **** (maxal kb…ôkuj) koŇč ¶u ka ńßajpa na. dńß…ô…ĺan kndkilan dńß…ô…ĺan kt…ô…ôtu kklaan ptpaan …ĺulu mg…ô…ĺiq …ĺu…ĺu malu moda mqu…ĺi siŇč ¶u n…ôiwan, pgqi…ĺi ** (mmt…ô…ĺu kmxalan) sij…ôntaw …ĺ…ômux ¶ij…ônsu, kl…ô…ôlu moda na…ĺo, ji…ĺaw, t…ônpu ma sijo…ĺuwan knii alaŇč, ńßm…ĺinas pa…ĺu ńßako sijo…ĺuwan di pg…ô…ĺiq …ôluw sijo ¶iŇč, kii d…ôńßuk ka alaŇč ¶iŇč…ĺu. pnsltulun t…ôn ¶u titu t…ôn ¶u titu alaŇč kluwan nj…ôn ¶umiŇč tajal s…ĺ…ôŇčo dańßa ka…ĺi ka…ĺi tajal ma ka…ĺi plmukan pnjaan alaŇč ńßini jaani b…ô…ĺańß kiŇčal kb…ôkuj (***..) msŇča…ĺi knkawas ńßa…ĺi, s…ô…ôdiq taikaŇčs…ô, mnswai pinuwkan ma wa…ĺannuw qmita ka dńß…ôa, k…ôan ba knmalu pńßmaan ma muuxul bal…ô ka ka…ĺa ¶ ńßini, kii dmdudul pk…ĺana s…ô…ôdiq m…ô…ôniq ńßini, ado kn…ĺańßu…ĺ bal…ô s…ô…ôdiq, kii duma s…ô…ôdiq wada mtńß…ô…ĺuj m…ôniq sipo. ani si sqlńßaŇčan nińßoŇč ¶iida dig…ô pnspuwan ka sipo du…ĺi di, kii k…ôsun dańßa ¶iŇč…ĺus…ô.
